title: Myanmar Compound Confusion Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating compound_confusion.yaml - Compound word confusion detection patterns

ha_htoe_compounds.description: Missing ha-htoe (ှ) on a compound component. Keys are wrong compound forms, values specify wrong/correct components.

aspirated_compounds.description: Wrong aspiration on initial consonant. Keys are wrong compound forms, values specify wrong/correct components.

consonant_confusion_compounds.description: Visual/phonetic consonant confusion in compound words. Keys are wrong compound forms, values specify wrong/correct components.

suffix_confusion_replacements.description: Generic suffix-level confusion repairs. Keys are wrong suffixes, values are correct suffixes.

compound_correction_entry.description: Compound confusion correction specifying wrong and correct components

wrong.description: The incorrect component within the compound

overlap.description: Tag indicating potential redundancy with existing algorithmic detectors
